mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, phone, avatar_url, nickname, status, user_type, registered_at, source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatarUrl}, #{nickname}, #{status}, #{userType}, #{registeredAt}, #{source}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET comment_disabled = #{commentDisabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET upload_disabled = #{uploadDisabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login = #{lastLogin}, last_ip = #{lastIp} WHERE id = #{id}
